critical_findings: validate_resume_compatibility accepts two manifests when the same resume-hard fields are jointly missing, including {} -> {}.
validate_resume_compatibility(..., unsafe=True) can bypass mismatches without an unsafe_record and therefore without a recorded reason or revocation evidence.
Campaign identity is optional and excludes experiment_command and resolved_config_path; arbitrary commands and unbound resolved config content can validate.
A campaign can be executable while baseline_launch_authorized is false.
Campaign hashes are checked only for SHA-256 syntax, not rebound to source bytes.
Declared variables can waive protected fairness fields; architecture cell labels are not bound to physical model configs.

CFG and sampling-step fields are not required, an epoch field is accepted, artifact completeness is existence-only, resumability metadata is truthy-only, and aggregation can omit an entire cell while reporting complete.
The focused tests do not provide an end-to-end zero-launch CLI test for all campaign commands.
training_blockers: campaign identity, fairness, and execution-binding defects
final frozen Dataset-v5 hashes do not exist
final model-config hash does not exist
evaluation-contract implementation and certification remain incomplete
a ready and independently certified three-seed campaign does not exist
